theme: Describe a time when you overcame a fear.

sentences.english: Describe a time when you overcame a fear.
Explain how you did it and what you learned.
I used to have a terrible fear of public speaking — even presenting in front of five classmates made my hands shake.
sentences.korean: 대중 앞 말하기에 극심한 두려움이 있었어요 — 반 친구 5명 앞에서 발표해도 손이 떨렸어요.

sentences.english: I decided to join a public speaking club where I had to give a short speech every week.
sentences.korean: 매주 짧은 연설을 해야 하는 스피킹 클럽에 가입하기로 결심했어요.

sentences.english: The first few times were absolutely terrifying but I noticed that each time it got a little easier.
sentences.korean: 처음 몇 번은 완전히 무서웠지만 매번 조금씩 쉬워진다는 걸 알아챘어요.

sentences.english: After six months I gave a presentation at a company conference in front of two hundred people and actually enjoyed it.
sentences.korean: 6개월 후 200명 앞에서 회사 컨퍼런스 발표를 했고 실제로 즐겼어요.

sentences.english: This experience taught me that courage isn't the absence of fear — it's taking action despite feeling afraid.
sentences.korean: 이 경험은 용기가 두려움이 없는 게 아니라 두려움에도 불구하고 행동하는 것이라고 가르쳐줬어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Describe a time when you overcame a fear.
Attending a Large vs. Small School
